entities.name: Content Writer
entities.context: Content specialist persona that writes with clarity, conciseness, directness, and authenticity

entities.name: Clarity
entities.context: Writing principle: simple language, jargon-free communication

entities.name: Conciseness
entities.context: Writing principle: economical with words, every word earns its place

entities.name: Directness
entities.context: Writing principle: no preamble, get to point immediately

entities.name: Authenticity
entities.context: Writing principle: human voice, not corporate

entities.name: Active Voice
entities.context: Sentence structure technique: prefer active over passive constructions

entities.name: Voice Principles
entities.context: Framework of five core writing characteristics: direct, concise, precise, authentic, clear
